title: Grilled Zombie Meat
description: When you grill rotten flesh, this turns it into grilled zombie meat.
body:
# Grilled Zombie Meat Mod
## Overview

This Mod lets you grill rotten flesh in a blast furnace, smoker, or campfire to turn it into **Grilled Zombie Meat**.  
Once prepared, it becomes a food item with nutrition slightly below steak, offering **Hunger 6** and a **Saturation coefficient of 0.8**.

## Food Stats
- Hunger: **+6** (equivalent to 3 meat icons)
- Saturation: **+9.6** (derived as 6 × 0.8 × 2)
- Thanks to its high hidden saturation, natural health regeneration becomes easier.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ba22aac7c41771a0451c0c07632820e5262726.png)
